label.purpose: Geist Mono numeric indices and metadata only.

shadows.name: hover-lift
shadows.purpose: Optional neutral hover cue on interactive cards, dark theme only. Never tinted.

motion.name: ease-out-quart
motion.purpose: Default easing for entrances and state transitions. No bounce, no elastic.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The one violet CTA. Solid fill, no gradient, no glow.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(0.65 0.19 292); color: #ffffff; padding: 14px 28px; border: none; border-radius: 12px; font-family: Archivo, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.72 0.16 292); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.65 0.19 292); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: transparent; color: oklch(0.96 0.005 290); padding: 14px 28px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.36 0.025 290); border-radius: 12px; font-family: Archivo, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1), border-color 200ms; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: oklch(0.18 0.014 290); border-color: oklch(0.44 0.03 290); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.65 0.19 292); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Tonal surface with hairline border. Flat at rest.
components.html:
Project Title

One or two lines of trimmed description that earns its place.
components.css: .ds-card { background: oklch(0.18 0.014 290); border: 1px solid oklch(0.28 0.02 290); border-radius: 16px; padding: 24px; transition: border-color 200ms cubic-bezier(0.25, 1, 0.5, 1); } .ds-card:hover { border-color: oklch(0.36 0.025 290); } .ds-card h3 { font-family: Archivo, system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 20px; color: oklch(0.96 0.005 290); margin: 0 0 8px; } .ds-card p { font-family: Archivo, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.6; color: oklch(0.78 0.012 290); margin: 0; }

components.name: Filter Chip
components.description: Curated category filter. Selected state is the only violet fill.
components.css: .ds-chip { display: inline-block; background: oklch(0.21 0.016 290); color: oklch(0.78 0.012 290); border: 1px solid oklch(0.28 0.02 290); border-radius: 9999px; padding: 6px 14px; font-family: Archivo, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: border-color 200ms; } .ds-chip:hover { border-color: oklch(0.36 0.025 290); } .ds-chip-selected { background: oklch(0.65 0.19 292); color: #ffffff; border-color: transparent; }

components.name: Input
components.description: Quiet field; focus is a violet ring, not a glow.
components.css: .ds-input { background: oklch(0.18 0.014 290); color: oklch(0.96 0.005 290); border: 1px solid oklch(0.28 0.02 290); border-radius: 12px; padding: 12px 16px; font-family: Archivo, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 15px; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; transition: border-color 200ms; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.64 0.015 290); } .ds-input:focus { outline: 2px solid oklch(0.65 0.19 292); outline-offset: 0; border-color: oklch(0.65 0.19 292); }

components.name: Nav Item
components.description: Mono index + label; active gets solid violet underline.
components.css: .ds-nav-item { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 8px 12px; color: oklch(0.78 0.012 290); font-family: Archivo, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; position: relative; transition: color 200ms; } .ds-nav-item:hover { color: oklch(0.96 0.005 290); } .ds-nav-num { font-family: ui-monospace, monospace; font-size: 10px; color: oklch(0.64 0.015 290); letter-spacing: 0.04em; } .ds-nav-active { color: oklch(0.96 0.005 290); } .ds-nav-active::after { content: ''; position: absolute; left: 12px; right: 12px; bottom: 0; height: 2px; border-radius: 2px; background: oklch(0.65 0.19 292); }

narrative.overview: A quiet, purple-tinted room where precise instruments sit on dark surfaces and the only spectacle is the geometry itself. The dimensional identity lives in real-time WebGL scenes; everything around them is deliberately flat, tonal, and exact. Confidence comes from restraint: hairline borders, a single committed accent, expanded-width display type, generous spacing.
keyCharacteristics: Purple-tinted neutrals everywhere; no pure black or pure white anywhere.
One accent (purple) in UI chrome; cyan and pink exist only inside WebGL scenes.
Hairline borders and tonal surface steps instead of shadows and glows.
Single type family (Archivo) with committed weight and width contrast.
3D scenes never trap scroll and never require lock/unlock instructions.

rules.name: The One Accent Rule
rules.body: Treez Violet is the only chromatic color permitted in 2D UI. If a second color appears outside a WebGL canvas or a semantic state, it is a bug.

rules.name: The Scene Exception
rules.body: Cyan and pink are stage lighting, not brand chrome. They exist only inside <Canvas>.

rules.name: The No-Gradient-Chrome Rule
rules.body: Gradients are prohibited on buttons, borders, text, badges, chips, and underlines. Only alpha fade masks and the hero background wash are permitted.

rules.name: The Width-Is-Voice Rule
rules.body: Hierarchy is expressed through Archivo's weight and width axes, never through color, gradients, or added families.

rules.name: The One Kicker Rule
rules.body: The repeated uppercase eyebrow label above every section heading is prohibited. Sections open with the headline itself.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Surfaces are flat at rest. A state change may lighten the surface one tonal step or strengthen the hairline; it never adds a colored glow.

dos: Do use Treez Violet as the single accent, on a small fraction of the screen.
Do express depth with tonal surface steps and hairline borders; save real depth for the WebGL scenes.
Do set display type in Archivo at weight 700 / width 125 with -0.02em tracking.
Do keep every canvas scrollable: touch-action pan-y, zoom disabled, no lock UI.
Do trim copy so cards in a row are naturally equal height.
Do verify 4.5:1 contrast in both themes and honor prefers-reduced-motion.
donts: Don't use gradients on buttons, card borders, text, badges, underlines, or separators.
Don't use cyan or pink anywhere outside a WebGL canvas.
Don't repeat an uppercase tracked eyebrow label above section headings.
Don't render badge walls: no auto-generated filter unions, no 28-chip technology grids.
Don't use backdrop-blur decoratively; the scrolled header is the one permitted use.
Don't add lock/unlock overlays, hints, or buttons to 3D scenes.
Don't use side-stripe borders, gradient text, or pulsing status badges.
